hero.title: Radiant Waves Media Late Night Global News
hero.description: Tuesday, July 14, 2026. Late Night Edition. Here are today's verified breaking headlines, World Cup updates, politics, business, technology and security news from around the world.

breaking: 🔴 Spain defeat France 2-0 to qualify for the FIFA World Cup Final
🔴 England and Argentina prepare for tomorrow's second World Cup semi-final
🔴 France marks Bastille Day under heightened security and extreme heat
🔴 European leaders reaffirm support for Ukraine during Bastille Day celebrations
🔴 Middle East diplomatic efforts continue amid regional security concerns
🔴 Nigeria sustains nationwide operations against terrorism, banditry and kidnapping
🔴 Global markets continue monitoring inflation, oil prices and interest-rate outlook
🔴 Artificial intelligence investment remains a major focus across global economies

featured.title: Spain Reach FIFA World Cup Final
featured.content: Spain booked their place in the FIFA World Cup Final after a commanding 2-0 victory over France in Dallas. La Roja produced a disciplined display to eliminate one of the tournament favourites and now await the winner of Wednesday's semi-final between England and Argentina.

articles.title: Spain Eliminate France
articles.description: Spain defeated France 2-0 in the FIFA World Cup semi-final to secure a place in Sunday's World Cup Final after an impressive all-round performance.

articles.title: France Fall Short In Semi-Final
articles.description: France were unable to recover after conceding twice against Spain. Didier Deschamps' side now prepare for the third-place playoff.

articles.title: England And Argentina Ready
articles.description: England and Argentina meet on Wednesday in the second FIFA World Cup semi-final, with the winner advancing to face Spain in the final.

articles.title: World Cup Final Takes Shape
articles.description: Spain become the first team to reach the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final, while football fans await the outcome of England versus Argentina.

articles.title: France Celebrates Bastille Day
articles.description: France marked Bastille Day with heightened security measures and ceremonies highlighting European unity and continued support for Ukraine.

articles.title: Middle East Diplomacy Continues
articles.description: Regional and international leaders continued diplomatic engagement aimed at reducing tensions and improving humanitarian access.

articles.title: Heatwave Continues Across Europe
articles.description: Extreme temperatures remain across parts of Europe, prompting health alerts and increasing wildfire risks in several countries.

articles.title: United States Hosts Semi-Finals
articles.description: Host cities continue welcoming thousands of supporters as the FIFA World Cup reaches its decisive final stages.

articles.title: Asia Advances Technology Investment
articles.description: Governments and technology companies continue investing in artificial intelligence, semiconductor manufacturing and digital innovation.

articles.title: Nigeria Sustains Security Operations
articles.description: Security agencies continue coordinated operations against insurgents, terrorists, bandits and kidnapping gangs across affected regions.

articles.title: Economic Reform Remains Priority
articles.description: Inflation, food security, infrastructure development and investment remain central to Nigeria's economic agenda.

articles.title: Regional Trade Cooperation Expands
articles.description: African countries continue strengthening regional trade and infrastructure partnerships under the African Continental Free Trade Area.

articles.title: Markets Monitor Global Economy
articles.description: Investors continue watching inflation trends, central bank decisions, energy prices and geopolitical developments affecting global growth.

articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Investment Grows
articles.description: Governments and technology companies continue expanding investment in AI, robotics, cloud computing and cybersecurity.

articles.title: Global Leaders Focus On Stability
articles.description: Governments continue balancing economic growth, security and international cooperation amid evolving global challenges.

breakingHistory: Spain defeated France 2-0 to reach the FIFA World Cup Final.
England and Argentina meet on Wednesday for the second semi-final.
France celebrated Bastille Day under heightened security.
European leaders reaffirmed support for Ukraine.
Europe continues experiencing an intense summer heatwave.
Middle East diplomatic engagement remains active.

The FIFA World Cup Final is now one match away.
